Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Hanging Tree]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — The Hanging Tree is a blood-red sapling that writhes with hunger and has crimson leaves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — The Hanging Tree is a force that Naraka was in the forest to sabotage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — The Hanging Tree is used for sacrifices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — The Hanging Tree is a blood-red Ragnarus tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Losing the Hanging Tree will release other Incarnations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — A Hanging Tree is an artifact of Ragnarus that seals Incarnations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Destroying more Hanging Trees allows Incarnations to escape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — The Hanging Tree must be in contact with the earth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Grandmaster Naraka attempts to summon power to incinerate the Hanging Tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — The Grandmasters failed to destroy even one Hanging Tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — The Hanging Tree was an object or location Alin's mission intended to destroy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — King Zakareth intends to defend the Hanging Tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — The Hanging Tree is a target for striking.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — The Hanging Tree is a target for a strike team in Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — The first nine Hanging Trees were planted by the King's ancestors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — King Zakareth planted a tenth Hanging Tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Tamara carries a seed to the Hanging Tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — The Hanging Trees have been handed down for generations.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — The remnants of Cana's Hanging Tree were found at the bottom of a hole in the floor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Cana once had a Hanging Tree in the dungeon beneath the palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — The Hanging Trees failed Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — The Incarnations were sealed underneath the Hanging Trees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — An ancient Incarnation was sealed beneath the Hanging Tree for over three centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Hanging Trees can seal Incarnations at the cost of blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — The Hanging Trees are used for the system of sealing Incarnations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — The Hanging Trees can feed on a person and drain their power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — Indirial wondered if he was sealed underneath a Hanging Tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Leah thought about who could be sealed beneath Cana's Hanging Tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — The Hanging Trees were not meant to work on Queen Cynara's kind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Hanging Tree can swarm and devour targets with crimson branches.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
